flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Canisius University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($30.9k → $34.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Canisius University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($30.9k → $34.5k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Canisius University fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (81.6% → 72.6%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Canisius University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.3% → 0.0%).
